name: Nikki Glaser
bio: Nikki Glaser is an American stand-up comedian, actress, and television host known for candid, explicit material about sex, dating, and her own insecurities, and for her sharp roast performances. Her 2019 Netflix special Bangin was the most-watched special on the platform when it premiered, and she went on to release the HBO specials Good Clean Filth and Someday Youll Die. She became the first solo female host of the Golden Globe Awards in 2025.

timeline.ev: Not Safe with Nikki Glaser premieres on Comedy Central
Roast of Tom Brady set draws wide acclaim

First solo female host of the Golden Globe Awards
